title: The SEC delayed tokenizing stocks, and here’s why that’s a relief
summary: Before we rush to tokenize U.S. equities, we need compliance systems that understand context, not just checkboxes. Investors like Michael Burry see the danger, so should the rest of us, urges Chamarajnagar.

title: Ethereum Foundation cuts 20% of staff amid leadership exodus
summary: The reduction follows a period of significant upheaval at the organization’s leadership level.

title: Bitcoin may need to plunge 15% or more to mark bottom, according to this long-time indicator
summary: With bitcoin testing its 200 week moving average, on-chain data suggests the $50,000 to $54,000 range could become the next key battleground.

title: Former Robinhood Crypto COO Tanya Denisova joins stablecoin issuer Agora as head of operations
summary: The former Robinhood Crypto executive will oversee operations as Agora scales its rapidly growing AUSD stablecoin business.

title: In Clarity Act's final weeks, its path through U.S. Senate not getting much clearer
summary: Tough negotiations linger in several difficult arenas, but crypto's Washington lobbyists are flying in allies this week and still hoping for a July vote.
